creative_brief: Countdown timer prominently displayed. Urgent red/orange accents against clean design. Show limited spots filling up visually.
headline: Only 48 hours left to secure VIP access to FarmThru's investment round
subhead: Limited spots remaining for first access to invest in Australia's farm-direct grocery revolution
hero_copy: The VIP waitlist closes this Friday at midnight. After that, you'll have to wait with everyone else when our equity crowdfunding campaign launches on Birchal. VIP members get first access to invest from just $50, plus exclusive updates and a direct line to our founders. Your $5 refundable deposit secures your spot — but only if you act before we hit capacity.

sections.heading: Why investors are rushing to get VIP access
sections.body: Rachel Ward's regenerative beef used to travel 2,400km through wholesalers before reaching Sydney supermarkets. Now it goes direct to families via FarmThru's Brookvale hub — fresher, cheaper, with no middlemen taking a cut. We're proving farm-direct grocery works, but scaling requires capital. That's where you come in.

sections.heading: VIP perks you'll miss if you wait
sections.body: First access to invest when our campaign goes live on Birchal. Exclusive Q&As with our team. Priority updates on farm partnerships and hub expansion. All for a $5 refundable deposit. But VIP spots are genuinely limited — we cap the list to keep it meaningful for our community and manageable for our small team.

sections.heading: The clock is ticking
sections.body: Friday midnight: VIP waitlist closes. Mid-2026: Campaign launches on Birchal (VIP members get 48-hour head start). Investment range: $50 minimum, $10,000 maximum per person. We can't promise returns and there's no guarantee of success. But if you believe farm-direct grocery is the future, this is your chance to be part of building it.

sections.heading: Compliance
sections.body: This is a pre-registration page for an upcoming equity crowdfunding campaign. No money is being raised at this stage. Any future offer will be made via a disclosure document on Birchal. This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice before making any investment decision.
